content: pySHACL (RDFLib/pySHACL, latest 0.40.0) is a pure-Python SHACL validator for RDF graphs — no JVM required. It depends on rdflib>=7.3.0,<8.0 and owlrl>=7.6.2,<8 for OWL2-RL-based expansion before validation. Covers SHACL Core + most SHACL-SPARQL; lacks some SHACL Advanced Features (custom target types, JS extensions need optional pyduktape2) that the Java TopBraid SHACL API (Jena-based) supports more completely.
